name: ChatPlaysBuckshotRoulette
description: A mod to add twitch chat integration

channel.title: The channel the bot will read and chat in

secret.title: The bearer token the bot will use to log in to Twitch

defaultName.title: The name ChatPlaysBuckshotRoulette will enter in game when prompted

actionVotePeriod.title: How long chat will have to vote before an action occurs

instructionsCooldown.title: How long the bot will ignore !instructions for after a use
